title: FireAngel Optical Smoke Alarm - FA6615-R 10-Year Smoke Alarms for Home, Caravan with 5-Year Batteries - Smoke Detector Fire Alarm - ST-625 Replacement
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: SMOKE DETECTORS FOR HOME: The optical smoke alarm’s sensing chamber 'sees' smoke as it enters, enabling a fast response to slow-burning fires with thick white smoke.
FEWER NUISANCE ALARMS: The advanced optical sensor ensures the fire alarm is less prone to false alerts from cooking fumes. Avoid placing near bathrooms or kitchens.

EASY TO FIT: Attach the removable baseplate to the ceiling. Insert the batteries, and push and twist the alarm to secure. The baseplate is identical to FireAngel smoke alarms ST-622, ST-620, and ST-750, making replacements quick and easy.

SAFETY ASSURED: The FA6615 Fire Angel smoke alarm holds CE and UKCA marks and is certified to EN 14604:2005+AC:2008. It is suitable for domestic properties and leisure accommodation vehicles and includes a 5-year warranty.

FIREANGEL HOME SAFETY: We offer a wide range of safety products designed to protect you and your family. Choose from smart and wireless devices, as well as standard smoke, heat, and carbon monoxide alarms.
description: From the manufacturer Fire Safety The FireAngel FA6615-R optical smoke alarm is designed to make home protection simple, with easy installation, fewer nuisance alarms, and rigorous testing. OPTICAL SENSOR: The FA6615-R’s optical smoke sensing chamber ‘sees’ smoke as it enters the alarm, reducing the likelihood of false alarms. It is ideal for slow-burning fires that produce thick white smoke. 5-YEAR BATTERY : Each smoke detector has a 10-year sensor life and comes with 2 x 5-year replaceable batteries. When the batteries are low, the device will alert you with a 'chirp,' and the red operational LED will flash once every 40 seconds. Replace the batteries ASAP. EASY REPLACEMENTS: The FA6615-R’s baseplate is identical to those of the ST-622, ST-620, and ST-750 smoke alarm models, eliminating the need to install a new baseplate. Simply remove the old smoke alarm (whether it’s an ST-622, ST-620, or ST-750), insert the batteries into your new FA6615-R alarm, and twist to secure it to the existing baseplate. SUITABLE FOR DOMESTIC PREMISES ONLY: Suitable for domestic properties, including leisure accommodation vehicles (LAV). Not suitable for commercial properties. At FireAngel, we're dedicated to protecting and improving our customers’ lives by creating innovative, cutting-edge fire safety technology that is both practical and accessible. FireAngel: Smarter solutions for safer homes. Third-Party Tested Smoke alarms provide an essential early warning system for house fires. The FA6615-R smoke alarm has undergone comprehensive third-party testing by independent parties to ensure its quality and longevity. The FA6615-R meets British Safety Standard EN 14604:2005+AC:2008 Sleep Easy To test the device, press the large test button. A loud, high-pitched sound will confirm that the alarm is functioning correctly. If a low battery alert occurs at night, you can activate Sleep Easy mode to silence the smoke detector for 8 hours by pressing the test button. Safety Guidelines The FA6615-R smoke alarm is suitable for the landing, hallway, bedroom, living room, and dining room. Smoke alarms should be installed at least 300 mm away from light fittings and walls, and ideally positioned as centrally as possible in the room. Sensor Type Optical Sensor Battery Type 2 x AA alkaline replaceable batteries (included) Dimensions 118.1 mm (diameter) x 31.5 mm (depth) Alarm Sound Level 85dB(A) at 3m (minimum) Installation Positions Wall / ceiling Operating Temperature +4°C to +38°C Operating Humidity Up to 90% RH (non condensing) Weight 185 g Certified to EN 14604:2005+AC:2008 Leisure Accommodation Vehicles Yes Safety First What should I do if my smoke alarm sounds? In the event of a smoke alarm sounding: STAY CALM: Don’t panic, take immediate action to ensure your own safety and that of others. CHECK FOR SMOKE OR FIRE: Look for visible smoke or flames. If you see either, evacuate immediately. EVACUATE: Leave the premises as quickly as possible using the nearest exit. Do not use lifts. Take the stairs. Ensure everyone is accounted for and exits safely. CLOSE THE DOORS: Close doors behind you as you leave to slow the spread of smoke. CALL 999: Once outside, call the emergency services, providing the operator with your location and any details about the fire. DO NOT RE-ENTER: Do not go back into the building until it has been declared safe by the fire service. About Us We pride ourselves on product reliability and quality. Since 1998, we’ve deployed over 80 million safety products, protecting over 25 million homes nationwide. Sustainability We’re committed to reducing our impact on the planet; that’s why we've reduced the plastic in our packaging and have unique products that use less energy. The FireAngel range In addition to our smoke alarms for the home, we offer a wide range of other safety products designed to protect you and your family. Choose from smart and wireless devices, as well as standard fire, carbon monoxide (CO), and heat alarms.
